A0161.title: On-Chain Data Access Control
A0161.definition: Implementing encryption and access control mechanisms for sensitive data to restrict unauthorized read access.
A0161.description: Data Protection: Store sensitive data off-chain; retain only hashes on-chain; encrypt data before uploading to the chain; utilize access control lists; apply proxy re-encryption; enforce threshold decryption.
A0161.limitation: Reduced transparency; complex key management; performance overhead.
